diagrams.title: Command Line Argument Memory Layout
diagrams.description: Shows how argc and argv are arranged in memory when program is called with: ./program hello world 123
elements: Arrow showing argc=4 matches array size
diagrams.purpose: Understanding argv array structure and how arguments are stored in memory, including the null terminator.

diagrams.title: Flow of Command Line Processing
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow from user input to program execution
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the complete journey of command line arguments from user input to program execution.

diagrams.title: Argument Validation Flowchart
diagrams.description: Decision flowchart for validating command line arguments in a program expecting 2 arguments
diagrams.purpose: Understanding proper validation sequence to prevent crashes and provide user feedback.
